purpose: Machine-readable minimum retrospective evidence required before knowledge-completion blockers can be closed.

requirements.rationale: Bazi interpretation rules need more than one deidentified human-approved case before stronger claims are considered calibrated.
Ziwei palace/star interpretation needs repeated deidentified calibration before single-star or palace patterns can be treated as stable.
Western astrology language is symbolic and time-sensitive, so reader feedback must be checked before it influences reusable wording.
Liuyao question reading needs repeated deidentified question outcomes before short-term judgment patterns can be considered calibrated.
Reader-rich paid-report writing rules require repeated deidentified reader feedback, not just internal taste.

Relationship reports combine two individual charts, deterministic cross facts and delicate reader positioning, so real deidentified feedback is required before reusable relationship claims are treated as calibrated.

Multi-person career synastry combines individual facts, pair relationship facts, team business context and city/timing judgment, so repeated deidentified team feedback is required before reusable team-level claims are treated as calibrated.
Fengshui and direction guidance is low-risk auxiliary advice unless repeated deidentified feedback shows which space, direction or city suggestions actually help or mislead readers.
The global retrospective layer is not complete until at least one audited human-approved retrospective has been promoted.
